subject: Consolidation hearing set for Tuesday
body_preview: Charles, the public hearing on the Sage Creek and Pronghorn Valley consolidation is confirmed for Tuesday at 6:30 at the courthouse. Packet to follow.

subject: Busing cost figures
body_preview: Got your mileage numbers. The hour-each-way figure on the Pronghorn route is the one the board needs to see. Bring it Tuesday.

subject: Public comment sign-up list
body_preview: Eleven families have signed up for public comment so far, most from Sage Creek. Three minutes each as you asked.

subject: Route mileage report attached
body_preview: Attached is the bus route mileage report for District 3. Pronghorn Valley and Sage Creek runs are broken out separately.

subject: FY26 budget shortfall summary
body_preview: Summary of the projected shortfall is attached for the board work session. Per-pupil costs at both small schools are flagged.

subject: Enrollment numbers for the board
body_preview: Current enrollment for Sage Creek Elementary as requested for the board packet. Figures are as of the first of the month.

subject: Trustee training confirmation
body_preview: Your registration for the spring trustee training in Cheyenne is confirmed. Session covers district consolidation procedure.

subject: Petition signatures for Tuesday
body_preview: We have gathered just over two hundred signatures opposing closure. We would like five minutes before the board Tuesday.

subject: Pronghorn Valley building report
body_preview: Maintenance walk-through is done. Roof and boiler are the two big items. Estimate is attached for the board to review.

subject: Small school funding guidance
body_preview: Updated guidance on the small school funding adjustment is posted. It affects how District 3 reports the two elementaries.
